contexts.context: ...could write tolerably smooth verses, and string epithets <mark>prettily</mark> together, when their prose themes showed the barrenness...
...a greater degree, that faculty which Coleridge so <mark>prettily</mark> describes in one line— My eyes make pictures...
...could write tolerably smooth verses, and string epithets <mark>prettily</mark> together, when their prose themes showed the barrenness...
